title: Belles on Their Toes
writer: Phoebe Ephron, Henry Ephron, Frank B. Gilbreth Jr.
actors: Jeanne Crain, Myrna Loy, Debra Paget
plot: The "Cheaper by the Dozen" crew is back, sans Clifton Webb. Lillian is struggling to make ends meet without her husband's income, while Anne, Martha, and Ernestine find romance.
